info.title: hKask API
info.description: A Minimal Viable Container for Agents - HTTP API

post.summary: Chat with the Curator or a specified agent.
post.description:
Accepts an optional `model` field to switch the LLM at request time.
When omitted, the server default (`qwen3:8b`) is used. The response
echoes the `model` used, confirming which LLM generated the output.

Use `GET /api/models` or `GET /api/models/search?q=...` to discover
available model identifiers.

post.summary: Stream chat inference output as Server-Sent Events.
post.description:
Accepts the same `ChatRequest` as `/api/chat` but streams the inference
output as SSE `data:` events. Each event carries a JSON object with
`text_delta`, `model`, and optionally `finish_reason`. The final event
has `finish_reason: "stop"` and includes `usage` stats.

This is a surface-layer endpoint — it bypasses ChatService's full
pipeline (memory recall, episodic storage) and calls the inference port
directly for streaming. Use `/api/chat` for the full pipeline with
memory integration.

get.summary: Subscribe to CNS events as an SSE stream.
get.description:
The endpoint upgrades the HTTP response to a long-lived SSE connection.
Events matching the requested span namespaces are forwarded in real time.
Lag notifications are emitted when the client falls behind.

post.summary:
Improv turn request
Create chat session
Execute an improvisation turn in a chat session

get.summary: Query episodic memories for the authenticated caller by entity.
get.description:
Routes through `EpisodicStoragePort` with OCAP discipline.
Applies confidence decay, temporal attention weighting, and deduplication
(subloops 2a.2–2a.4) before returning results.

post.summary: Store an episodic triple for the authenticated caller.
post.description:
Routes through `EpisodicStoragePort` with OCAP discipline:
the `DelegationToken` from HTTP auth is verified at the membrane.

get.summary: Get episodic storage usage for the authenticated caller.

post.description:
Requires authentication via Bearer token. Dispatches the tool call
through the MCP runtime with capability verification. The server
that owns the tool is resolved automatically from the tool name.

get.description:
Returns all tools discovered from running MCP servers. If no servers
are started, the list will be empty.

get.summary: List all available models from Okapi.
get.description:
Queries Okapi's `/api/tags` endpoint and returns metadata for each
locally loaded model. Returns an empty list if Okapi is unreachable
(graceful degradation).

get.summary: Search available models by name (fuzzy matching).
get.description:
Performs case-insensitive substring matching against Okapi model names.
Use this endpoint to discover valid model identifiers before passing
them to `POST /api/chat` via the `model` field.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Fuzzy search query — matches model name (case-insensitive substring)

get.summary: List specifications — with optional category filter
Get a single specification by ID
Get writing quality assessment for a spec (MDS §3: spec/require/writing-quality)

post.summary: Compose a new bundle from specified skills
Apply a bundle to the current session
Evolve a bundle (re-compose when skills have changed)
Start a standing ensemble session with initial context

post.description:
Uses `GitCasAdapter::load_template_crate` for template loading (domain
operation) and `GitCASPort::resolve_ref` for SHA resolution.

get.summary: Resolve a git reference to a SHA using GitCASPort

ChatRequest.description:
Chat request sent to the Curator or a specified agent.

The `model` field allows switching the LLM at request time. When omitted,
the server default (qwen3:8b) is used. Use `GET /api/models` to discover
available models, and `GET /api/models/search?q=...` for fuzzy matching.

model.description: Model override for inference (e.g., "qwen3:8b"). If unset, uses the server default.

template_id.description: Optional template ID to contextualize the prompt

ChatResponse.description:
Chat response from the Curator or agent.

The `model` field echoes which LLM was used, confirming model switching.

CnsSubscribeParams.description: Query parameters for CNS SSE subscription

oneOf.description: Whether an existing bundle was found matching these skills

manifest.description: The composed bundle manifest (if composition was performed)

agent_webid.description: Agent WebID whose episodic memory to consolidate

confidence_floor.description:
Confidence floor — semantic triples at or below this are deleted.
Overrides the SemanticLoop default (0.33).

max_semantic_triples.description:
Maximum semantic triples to retain after consolidation.
If exceeded, lowest-confidence triples are deleted.

passphrase.description:
Master passphrase for authorization (derived via HKDF-SHA256 to produce
the capability_key used as the DB passphrase, matching onboarding flow)

EpisodeResponse.description: A single episodic triple as returned over the API.

count.description: Current triple count for the caller's perspective.

server.description: MCP server that provided the tool

ModelEntry.description:
A model available through Okapi.

Includes metadata from Okapi's `/api/tags` endpoint: model family,
parameter count, quantization level, and disk size.

ModelListResponse.description:
Response containing available Okapi models.

Returned by `GET /api/models` and `GET /api/models/search`.
Model names from this response can be used as the `model` field
in `POST /api/chat` requests.

count.description: Total number of models in the list

ModelSearchQuery.description:
Query parameters for fuzzy model search.

The `q` parameter performs case-insensitive substring matching
against model names. For example, `q=llama` matches "llama3.1:8b",
"llama3.1:70b", etc.

q.description: Fuzzy search query — matches model name (case-insensitive substring)

ParticipantEntryRequest.description: Participant entry for standing session start

domains.description:
Template domains this participant owns (e.g., `["cns", "storage"]`).
Converted to capability specs (`"tool:<domain>:execute"`) internally.

ParticipantStatusResponse.description: Participant status in standing session response

SpecCaptureRequestDto.description: Spec capture request — MDS-aligned: uses description + context (not category/domain/criteria).

SpecDetailResponse.description: Spec detail response (single spec by ID)

SpecWritingQualityResponse.description: Spec writing quality response — MDS §3: spec/require/writing-quality

StoreEpisodeRequest.description: Request to store an episodic triple.

StoreEpisodeResponse.description: Response from storing an episodic triple.
